title: Tingulonga martiana
taxonomy: Tingulonga martiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to Madagascar, an island country in the Indian Ocean. The classification of Tingulonga martiana places it in the kingdom Plantae, with its most specific classification being in the genus Aeschynanthus, not Tingulonga. However, the name Tingulonga martiana is sometimes used in botanical literature as a synonym for Aeschynanthus martianus. More research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Tingulonga martiana.
